nested-projects.svg: Controls whether projects inside other projects are shown as nested or flat.
pause-debug-process.svg: Indicator for a paused process that is being debugged.
run-to-line.svg: Run program to the selected line in debug mode.
fatal_error.svg: Indicates the presence of fatal errors.
copy.svg: Duplicates the selected content to the clipboard without removing it.
paste.svg: Inserts the clipboard content at the current location.
go-previous-in-current-file.svg: Go to previous annotation in current file
inherited-members-filter.svg: Toggles visibility of inherited methods/fields in views
go-next-in-current-file.svg: Go to next annotation in current file
resume.svg: Resume until next breakpoint in debug mode.
step-into.svg: Step into next operation in debug mode.
toggle-breakpoint-filter.svg: Toggle for enabling breakpoint filtering in debug mode.
step-over.svg: Step over next operation in debug mode.
step-return.svg: Step out of current operation and return to last operation in debug mode.
suspend.svg: Suspend a running execution in debug mode.
run-last.svg: Run last launched run configuration again.
debug-process.svg: Indicator for a process that is being debugged.
working_sets.svg: Group elements for display in views or for operations on a set of elements.
expression.svg: Indicator for an expression in the expression tab of the debug perspective.
search-history.svg: Show a list of previous searches.
group-breakpoints-by-working-sets.svg: Group breakpoints by working sets in breakpoint view.
group-breakpoints-by-breakpoint-types.sv: Group breakpoints by breakpoint types in breakpoint view.
environment.svg: Indicator for the environment settings of a run/debug configuration.
single_orientation.svg: Single orientation of detail views in tabs.
automatic_orientation.svg: Automatic orientation of detail views in tabs.
horizontal_orientation.svg: Horizontal orientation of detail views in tabs.
vertical_orientation.svg: Vertical orientation of detail views in tabs.
group_by_project.svg: Group list items in various views by project.
group_by_folder.svg: Group list items in various views by folder.
group_by_file.svg: Group list items in various views by file.
back.svg: Go to last page in wizard action.
forward.svg: Go to next page in wizard action.
next.svg: Select next element in list action.
previous.svg: Select previous element in list action.
synchronize-resources.svg: Indicator for the Team Synchronizing perspective.
thread-running.svg: Indicator for a running thread in debug mode.
thread-paused.svg: Indicator for a paused thread in debug mode.
thread-terminated.svg: Indicator for a terminated thread in debug mode.
external-tools.svg: Run and configuration action for external tools.
skip-breakpoint.svg: Enable/Disable skipping of breakpoints in debug mode.
import_dir.svg: Open projects from file system in file menu.
export_dir.svg: Export general projects in export menu.
thread.svg: Indicator for a thread in debug mode.
drop-to-frame.svg: Drop to selected frame in debug mode.
active-frame.svg: Indicator for the active frame in debug mode.
frame.svg: Indicator for a frame in debug mode.
check.svg: Indicator for a checked option in a menu.
plugin.svg: Indicates features provided by an installed Eclipse plugin.
uncheck.svg: Indicator for an unchecked option in a menu.
internal_browser.svg: Enables the use of an internal web browser.
os-process-running.svg: Indicator for a running os process.
os-process-terminated.svg: Indicator for a terminated os process.
partition.svg: Indicator for a partition that is created for large indexed collections like lists in the variable view in debug mode.
register-group-indicator.svg: Indicator for a group of registers in the registers view.
register-indicator.svg: Indicator for a register in the registers view.
instruction-pointer.svg: Indicator for current instruction pointer in debug mode.
instruction-pointer-top-of-stack.svg: Indicator for the current instruction pointer in debug mode if the instruction is on top of the stack.
launch-group.svg: Indicator for launch group in run configurations.
memorychanged.svg: Indicator for changed memory in range in the memory view.
open_new_resource_wizard.svg: Open the create new resource wizard.
prototype.svg: Indicator for prototype tab in run configuration.
rename.svg: Rename resource action in file menu.
block-selection.svg: Select and edit a rectangular (column) area of text.
go-to.svg: Open resource action e.g. in system explorer.
highlight.svg: Toggle the highlighting of occurrences of an element in a file editor.
toggle-type-names.svg: Toggle type names for columns in variable view.
toggle-logical-structure.svg: Toggle the structure for certain items like hashmaps in the variable view.
cut.svg: Removes the selected content and places it on the clipboard.
minimap.svg: Provides a small preview code window.
sort.svg: Sort search results by match relevance.
progress_view.svg: Displays the progress of running operations.
new_text_file.svg: Create an empty untitled text file.
default.svg: Default icon, used as fallback icon when no specific one exists.
library.svg: Indicator for the module view and a classpath.
compare-previous-difference.svg: Go to previous difference in compare view.
compare-next-difference.svg: Go to next difference in compare view.
compare-previous-change.svg: Go to previous change in compare view.
compare-next-change.svg: Go to next change in compare view.
copy-from-right-to-left.svg: Copy content from right to left in compare view.
copy-from-left-to-right.svg: Copy content from left to right in compare view.
console-error-output.svg: Writes error output in console view.
console-standard-output.svg: Writes standard output in console view.
whitespace.svg: Shows spaces, tabs, and line breaks.
export-breakpoints.svg: Saves breakpoints to reuse or share.
